name: Mexican Fiesta Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 2 or 3 ripe tomatoes or to taste.
2. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
3. Cook and stir the meat in a large skillet until brown. Drain off the excess fat.
4. Season the meat with salt and pepper, then set aside.
5. Mix the cheese, sour cream, mayonnaise, and onion together.
6. Stir the baking mix and water together until a soft dough forms.
7. With floured fingers, pat the dough into a greased 13 X 9 X 2-inch baking pan, pressing the dough up the sides of the pan by about 1/2 inch.
8. Layer the meat, tomato slices, and green pepper onto the dough.
9. Spoon the sour cream mixture over the top and sprinkle with paprika if used.
10. Bake uncovered until the edges of the dough are light brown, about 25 to 30 minutes.
11. Let cool for 5 minutes before cutting into squares.
